name: developer-documentation
title: Developer documentation
description: Roam Research's official developer docs: window.roamAlphaAPI, extensions, the Backend API.

descriptions.Developer Hub: Entry point / map of all Roam Research developer documentation
descriptions.Roam Alpha API: The frontend JS API (window.roamAlphaAPI): datalog q/pull, block & page CRUD, UI control, file storage
descriptions.Roam Depot/Extension API: Extension API passed to Depot extensions (settings panels, commands, lifecycle)
descriptions.Roam Depot/Extensions: How to build, test and publish Roam Depot extensions
descriptions.roam/css: Theming Roam Research with custom CSS via the roam/css page
descriptions.roam/js: Running custom JavaScript in a graph via roam/js blocks
descriptions.Roam Backend API (Beta): Official REST API: datalog q / pull / pull-many + write actions over HTTP with roam-graph-tokens
descriptions.Roam Append API: Append-only HTTP API for capture (works with encrypted graphs)
descriptions.Yet-to-release updates: API changes announced but not yet released
descriptions.Contact Us: How to reach the Roam Research developer team
descriptions.Local API: Local HTTP API exposed by the Roam Research desktop app

name: help
title: Help & user documentation
description: Roam Research's official help graph: the product's user documentation.
